nodes.label: Local-First Project Folder Model
nodes.rationale: Project data and workflow stay local; a folder on disk is the durable project unit.

nodes.label: Transcript-As-Source-Of-Truth Editing
nodes.rationale: Sentence timing and transcript structure drive editing operations, clip anchoring, and subtitle regeneration.

nodes.label: Canonical SQLite Config Persistence
nodes.rationale: SQLite project_configs.config_json is the canonical store, with schema validation and deterministic hashing.

nodes.label: Root Uploads Directory Contract
nodes.rationale: All uploaded media is stored under root uploads and referenced by mediaId in project config.

nodes.label: Browser Storage Ownership For UI Preferences
nodes.rationale: Theme/language and editor recovery stay in browser storage; not persisted in backend DB.
nodes.norm_label: browser storage ownership for ui preferences

nodes.label: Four-Step Setup Flow
nodes.rationale: Setup completion requires Project Name, Voice, Subtitle, and Alignment before project creation.

nodes.label: Setup Draft/Session Boundary
nodes.rationale: Subtitle and alignment artifacts are staged in draft/session state before final project materialization.

nodes.label: Thumbnail Fallback Rule
nodes.rationale: Use first frame of latest successful render; otherwise deterministic three-color placeholder.

nodes.label: Deterministic Layer Render Order
nodes.rationale: Render stacking order and timeline visual order must stay consistent across editor and renderer.

nodes.label: Editor Render Gating By Config Changes
nodes.rationale: Render actions are enabled by project state and config hash difference from last successful render.
nodes.norm_label: editor render gating by config changes

nodes.label: Project-Scoped Render Route/API Surface
nodes.rationale: Render operations are anchored to projectId/renderId paths for queue, history, playback, and cancellation.

nodes.label: Explicit Render Stage Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Render progress must follow defined stages, persist events, and expose recoverable states.

nodes.label: Native File Picker Boundary Decision
nodes.rationale: Open question: whether setup file inputs should use native picker bridge, backend staging, or mocks.

nodes.label: Cross-Spec Visual Parity Inventory
nodes.rationale: A shared manifest assigns parity coverage across frontend-global, launcher, editor, and render screenshots.

nodes.label: Assign Modal Submit Payload Contract
nodes.rationale: Submit payload encodes mediaId, sentence range, resolved time span, compositing, layer target, motion, and transitions.

nodes.label: Render Hash-Diff Gating Contract
nodes.rationale: Already-rendered projects should re-render only when current config hash differs from last successful render hash.

nodes.label: Layer Stack Order (SUB > PiP > FG > BG)
nodes.norm_label: layer stack order (sub > pip > fg > bg)

nodes.label: Sentence Merge and Anchor Remap Flow
nodes.norm_label: sentence merge and anchor remap flow
